reason: Agent responded correctly to math question "Hello! What is 2+2?" with response "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing available agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260424-202649-wib2" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened successfully with agent detail view displayed
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the top right corner of the page
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully submitted via the message input box and Send button
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded almost immediately in 1 second with no delays

Verified the response mentions "4" and took a screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the agent's answer to the math question, shown in the chat message area. Screenshot captured at step-4-message-sent.png showing both the user message and the agent's numerical response.
